title: Echo Promenade: Distinct-Distance Stage Layout
strategies: Mian-Chowla / Golomb greedy: add the smallest position keeping every pairwise distance distinct, then fill remaining stages with smallest unused positions
seeded random-restart hill climbing: sample n random positions and relocate one stage at a time, accepting moves that increase the distinct-distance count |A-A|
algebraic perfect-difference-set constructions (e.g. Singer/quadratic-residue difference sets mod a prime) to cover many distinct spacings in a tight length budget
